sentences.target: Mein Rad steht hinter dem Haus.

translations.de: Mein Rad steht hinter dem Haus.
translations.en: My bike is behind the house.
translations.es: Mi bici está detrás de la casa.
translations.fr: Mon vélo est derrière la maison.
translations.it: La mia bici è dietro casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的自行车在房子后面。
translations.pt: Minha bicicleta está atrás da casa.
translations.vi: Xe đạp của tôi ở phía sau nhà.
translations.nl: Mijn fiets staat achter het huis.
translations.hu: A biciklim a ház mögött van.
translations.hi: मेरी साइकिल घर के पीछे है.
translations.el: Το ποδήλατό μου είναι πίσω από το σπίτι.
translations.id: Sepeda saya ada di belakang rumah.
translations.ro: Bicicleta mea este în spatele casei.
translations.ja: 私の自転車は家の裏にあります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular); agrees with neuter singular nominative; modifies 'Rad'.
Neuter singular noun; nominative subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular, present indicative; denotes static location.
Preposition meaning 'behind'; governs dative for static location.
Definite article; dative singular neuter; marks the noun in the prepositional phrase.
Neuter singular noun; dative object of the preposition 'hinter'.

sentences.target: Ich lege den Schlüssel hinter die Vase.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈleːɡə deːn ˈʃlʏsəl ˈhɪntɐ diː ˈvaːzə/

translations.de: Ich lege den Schlüssel hinter die Vase.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈleːɡə deːn ˈʃlʏsəl ˈhɪntɐ diː ˈvaːzə/
translations.en: I put the key behind the vase.
translations.es: Pongo la llave detrás del jarrón.
translations.fr: Je mets la clé derrière le vase.
translations.it: Metto la chiave dietro al vaso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把钥匙放在花瓶后面。
translations.yue: 我把條鎖匙擺喺花瓶後面。
translations.pt: Eu coloco a chave atrás do vaso.
translations.he: אני שם את המפתח מאחורי האגרטל.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt chìa khóa sau lọ hoa.
translations.nl: Ik leg de sleutel achter de vaas.
translations.hu: A kulcsot a váza mögé teszem.
translations.hi: मैं चाबी फूलदान के पीछे रख रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βάζω το κλειδί πίσω από το βάζο.
translations.id: Saya menaruh kunci di belakang vas.
translations.ja: 鍵を花瓶の後ろに置きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person singular; subject.
Finite main verb; 1st person singular, present indicative; transitive placement verb indicating motion.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; marks 'Schlüssel' as direct object.
Masculine singular noun; accusative direct object of 'lege'.
Preposition; with accusative to express direction/destination.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine; modifies 'Vase' in the PP.
Feminine singular noun; accusative complement of 'hinter' (goal of motion).

sentences.target: Der Bus hält hinter dem Bahnhof.

translations.de: Der Bus hält hinter dem Bahnhof.
translations.en: The bus stops behind the station.
translations.es: El autobús para detrás de la estación.
translations.fr: Le bus s'arrête derrière la gare.
translations.it: L'autobus si ferma dietro alla stazione.
translations.pt: O ônibus para atrás da estação.
translations.vi: Xe buýt dừng phía sau nhà ga.
translations.nl: De bus stopt achter het station.
translations.hu: A busz a pályaudvar mögött áll meg.
translations.hi: बस स्टेशन के पीछे रुकती है.
translations.el: Το λεωφορείο σταματά πίσω από τον σταθμό.
translations.ja: バスは駅の裏に停まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; modifies 'Bus'.
Masculine singular noun; nominative subject.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular, present indicative; intransitive 'to stop'.
Preposition; with dative for static location.
Definite article; dative singular masculine; modifies 'Bahnhof' in the PP.
Masculine singular noun; dative complement of 'hinter'.

sentences.target: Ich warte hinter dir in der Schlange.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə ˈhɪntɐ diːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃlaŋə/

translations.de: Ich warte hinter dir in der Schlange.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə ˈhɪntɐ diːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃlaŋə/
translations.en: I'm waiting behind you in the line.
translations.es: Espero detrás de ti en la fila.
translations.fr: J'attends derrière toi dans la queue.
translations.it: Sto aspettando dietro di te in fila.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在队里站在你后面等着。
translations.yue: 我喺隊入面企喺你後面等緊。
translations.ru: Я жду за тобой в очереди.
translations.pt: Estou esperando atrás de você na fila.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đứng sau bạn trong hàng.
translations.nl: Ik wacht achter je in de rij.
translations.uk: Я чекаю за тобою в черзі.
translations.hi: मैं लाइन में तुम्हारे पीछे इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg venter bak deg i køen.
translations.id: Aku menunggu di belakangmu di antrean.
translations.sv: Jag väntar bakom dig i kön.
translations.ro: Aștept în spatele tău la coadă.
translations.da: Jeg venter bag dig i køen.
translations.ja: 列であなたの後ろに並んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person singular; subject.
Finite main verb; 1st person singular, present indicative; intransitive.
Preposition; with dative for static location.
Personal pronoun; dative 2nd person singular; complement of 'hinter'.
Preposition; with dative to indicate location.
Definite article; dative singular feminine; modifies 'Schlange'.
Feminine singular noun; dative object of the preposition 'in'.
